summary: Tested My Tasks deletion bug fix. All features working correctly: Actions delete via /api/actions/{id}, Tasks delete via /api/task-instances/{id}, delete confirmation shows correct type, items removed instantly from list, toast shows correct message.
critical_code_review_comments: deleteTask API function correctly routes to /api/actions/{id} for actions and /api/task-instances/{id} for tasks based on isAction parameter
deleteMutation correctly passes source_type info via isAction: deleteTaskData?.source_type === 'action'
handleDeleteTask stores full task object to preserve source_type for routing
canDelete logic allows deletion of: in_progress tasks OR any non-completed action
React Query cache invalidation properly configured with queryClient.invalidateQueries for my-tasks, task-instances, task-stats, adhoc-plans, and actions
context_for_next_testing_agent: My Tasks deletion bug is fixed. Actions use /api/actions/{id} endpoint, Task Instances use /api/task-instances/{id}. The frontend deleteTask API function checks isAction parameter to route correctly. Delete buttons appear for in_progress tasks OR any non-completed action.

delete_action_from_my_tasks.description: Delete an Action from My Tasks page calls /api/actions/{id}
delete_action_from_my_tasks.details: Clicked delete button on action card, confirmed deletion, action removed from list instantly

delete_confirmation_dialog_type.description: Delete confirmation dialog shows correct type (Action vs Task)
delete_confirmation_dialog_type.details: Dialog title shows 'Delete Action' for actions, includes task title in confirmation message

my_tasks_page_loads_with_delete_buttons.description: My Tasks page loads correctly with action cards showing delete buttons
my_tasks_page_loads_with_delete_buttons.details: Found 19 task cards with 19 delete buttons visible

toast_message_correct_type.description: Toast message shows correct type after deletion
toast_message_correct_type.details: Toast shows 'Action deleted successfully' for action deletion

react_query_cache_invalidation.description: Deleted items do not reappear after page interaction
react_query_cache_invalidation.details: Task count decreased from 19 to 18 after deletion, item not in list

delete_task_instance_endpoint.details: Endpoint returns 404 for non-existent task (not 405 method not allowed)

source_type_field_present.description: My Tasks response includes source_type field for routing
source_type_field_present.details: All tasks have source_type field with value 'action' or 'task'

GET /api/my-tasks.response: Returns tasks with source_type field for routing delete requests

DELETE /api/actions/{id}.response: Returns {message: 'Action deleted'} and removes action from database

DELETE /api/task-instances/{id}.response: Endpoint exists and returns 404 for non-existent tasks
